cases.title: Tech Startup Goes from Idea to Pvt Ltd in 8 Days
cases.challenge: Founder needed fast incorporation to secure a seed round funding deadline.
cases.solution: Expedited filing via SPICe+ with same-day DSC issuance and parallel name reservation.
cases.result: Company incorporated in 8 working days. ₹50L seed round closed within 2 weeks of COI.
